name: button-group-dropdown
visual_summary: The button-group-dropdown is a component that combines a button group and a dropdown menu. It allows users to select from multiple options and is commonly used in navigation or as a way to filter data. This component is useful for applications where multiple actions or options need to be displayed in a compact and accessible way.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-dropdown
Description: The button-group-dropdown is a component that combines a button group and a dropdown menu. It allows users to select from multiple options and is commonly used in navigation or as a way to filter data. This component is useful for applications where multiple actions or options need to be displayed in a compact and accessible way.
Style: e.g. rounded, flat, inverse
Interactions: e.g. animated, hover, clickable
Tags: button, dropdown, navigation, filter

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
